title: Jack Moves and Bartolomeo Carries the Straw Hats
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on jack moves and bartolomeo carries the straw hats within the The World Reacts to Doflamingo's Fall storyline.
scene: Dressrosa's aftermath spreads outward: civilians, rulers, Marines, Doflamingo, Jack, and the Straw Hats all react to the new political balance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It shall begin! The greatest this world of pirates has ever seen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A war for hegemony!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Four Battle- Ships...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That is some serious overkill!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with this collection of people, they've got enough to topple a regime! Almost too many bigshots to call it just a regular escort convoy...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: This has gotta be Lord Doflamingo's convoy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Retrioving Joker is simply impossible, cap- tain jack. Shall we about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I take it we're on a one way trip to Impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If it's not too much to ask,

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I'd like a newspaper every day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that should be enough to stave off boredom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: FuffUFA FuffUFA!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: You DimWit... of course we're gonna take him back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What AAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Who in the hell do you think you're talkin' to!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heee Eeh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Tell me I'm seeing things!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why does this thing look like there's a better chance Luffy's on it than our own ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Barto Club pirate ship, the going Luffy Senpai

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Teehee... Hearing you say that makes me happy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's not a compli-ment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and in the direction this vivre card points,

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: I present the real Luffy-senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The first thing I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We thank you profusely for giving us the honor of stepping foot aboard this humble vessel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss! He's so bright I can't see his face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Same here, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So they're all the barto type, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo's the one that made this vivre card for me, and

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a man, Sabo-senpai! He's conside- rate, strong... ah, what a man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna be your under-ling, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I'll take a piece of that, just in case.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We'll take a piece too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: So, it's goodbye for now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope we meet you somewhere again, Boss!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Later, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh man, that sure was a sweet banquet ...I think I'm starting to like those guys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Bartolomeo. We should hurry to Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if Sanji and the others have made it there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami's with them, so they shouldn't have any problems navigating... but who knows what happened between them and big- mam's ship!

summary: Jack Moves and Bartolomeo Carries the Straw Hats: Dressrosa begins to heal while Doflamingo's capture sends shockwaves through the seas, from the Marines to Jack and the Straw Hats' new bounties.
